name: astro-layer
description: AI layer for building beautiful small-business Astro 6.3 websites — design tokens, 8-section library, GSAP, Vercel, SEO, self-improving hooks.

plugins.name: astro-layer
plugins.description: Gives Claude everything it needs to build complete, beautiful small-business Astro 6.3 websites autonomously. Vanilla CSS design tokens, 8-section business library, GSAP animations (opt-in), Vercel deployment, SEO with LocalBusiness JSON-LD, and a self-improving AI layer validated end-to-end.
